text: pkgdown template Spain Electoral Project. Provides unified visual identity (colors, typography, component styles) R packages ecosystem: infoelectoral opencis eleccionesdb vota

title: pkgdown Template for Spain Electoral Project
text: ’s . template provides: Design tokens: colors (#2d5bff accent), backgrounds, borders Typography: Inter (sans) + JetBrains Mono (code) via Google Fonts Navbar: white background, ◆ diamond branding, clean navigation Code blocks: light background syntax highlighting downlit tokens Components: cards, sidebar, buttons, footer — styled consistently
